when: Recommend when the learner can describe a situation verbally but cannot
operatorNote: keep the discussion on what each symbol stands for before simplifying

when: Recommend when the learner can copy an expression but cannot identify
operatorNote: make the learner read each term aloud by role, not only by symbol

when: Recommend when the learner substitutes values mechanically and loses sign,
operatorNote: separate substitution from simplification and check sign first

when: Recommend when the learner can start simplification but drops parentheses,
operatorNote: slow down structure changes before collecting terms

when: Recommend when the learner can simplify a naked expression but cannot build
operatorNote: translate the situation into named quantities first, then simplify
